highlights: Much smoother streaming — multi-second freezes during long replies are gone, and the sidebar/chat stay scrollable while agents type
Auto-scroll no longer fights you — scrolling up during a streaming reply now sticks until you tap Jump to Latest
Faster chat switching — opening a conversation no longer pauses on a catalog fetch before the composer becomes interactive
All your agents, groups, and projects show in the sidebar again — and your recent project folders are restored automatically on first launch
New testing affordances — open an existing conversation by URL (odyssey://chat?conversation=…), plus ⌘L to focus the composer and ⌘J to jump to the latest message
GitHub Inbox — triage and resolve GitHub issues with AI agents directly from the sidebar
Nostr P2P DM routing — connect to other Odyssey instances over the decentralized Nostr network
Schedule run history — foldable recent runs inline under each schedule, with project-aware working dir
Gemma 4 model family — 4B, 26B MoE, and 31B MLX variants with inline Download/Delete controls
Sidebar and settings polish — cleaner headers, simplified thread rows, B1 settings redesign
Voice mode — hold mic to speak, agents respond aloud via TTS
Ulysses companion — list agents, open chats, create agents, and schedule tasks by asking in natural language
Odyssey-control MCP — structured app control tools available to any Claude session
Sidebar redesign — flat thread list with auto-shown archived section and foldable project rows
Parallel instances — run multiple Odyssey instances with automatic lock-based naming
Executive team: CEO, CTO, CMO, CFO, CPO agents added to the default library
Lean Startup group — CEO-led cross-functional team ready to use
Ulysses — your new app companion for guidance and config management
